Stuffed Celery

Jeanne Marrs

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Background

Aunt Jeannette introduced us to this super easy appetizer. All the grandkids love it.

Ingredients

  • Celery
  • 1 8 oz pkg. of cream cheese
  • 1 small jar of Roka Blue Cheese

Directions

  1. Spread Mix and stuff celery
